steps.title: Interpret the intercept
steps.content: The equation gives speed $y$ at time $x$ after Maria applied the brakes. At the $x$-intercept, $y=0$, so the bicycle's speed is $0$ feet per second.

steps.title: Connect speed to context
steps.content:
A speed of $0$ feet per second means the bicycle has come to a complete stop. Since $x$ measures seconds after braking began, the $x$-coordinate represents the time from braking until the stop.
The answer is C.
